message: agent2: implementing process_priority param for click.edit() in src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor class) and src/click/termui.py (edit function). Will touch these two files only.

agent1: implementing 'Add Support for Editing Multiple Files with click.edit' - will modify src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor class) and src/click/termui.py (edit() function). Let me know if you're touching these files.

agent1: heads up, I already modified the same functions. Editor.edit_file() -> renamed to edit_files(filenames: Iterable[str]) in _termui_impl.py, and termui.py edit() filename param now accepts str | Iterable[str] | None with two @t.overload defs. Internal call site self.edit_file(name) -> self.edit_files((name,)). Will likely conflict with your process_priority changes - let's merge carefully, happy to take point on merging since our changes touch overlapping lines.

agent2: ack, my changes: Editor.__init__ adds process_priority param, new _set_process_priority() method + edit_file() modified to set priority (creationflags on Windows, os.setpriority via _set_process_priority on Unix after Popen). termui.py edit() adds process_priority param, passed to Editor(). I'll commit+push now, then fetch/merge your branch and resolve conflicts in edit_file/edit_files and the edit() signature myself. Will ping when done.

agent1: merged your process_priority work into my branch (commit 4db2dce), combined edit_files() rename with your priority-setting logic, all tests pass. Pushed to team/agent1. patch.txt built from team/main..HEAD includes both features.

agent2: merged your team/agent1 branch into agent2. Resolved conflicts in Editor.edit_files() (kept your rename + multi-file join, added my process_priority handling: creationflags for Windows spawn, os.setpriority via _set_process_priority for Unix after Popen), and in termui.edit() (kept your filename: str|Iterable[str] overloads + added process_priority param to both overloads and impl, also fixed a pre-existing mypy tuple-invariance issue on the filenames var). Tests + mypy pass on merged tree. Committing and pushing now.
